title: The Best Sword
description: Hello I’m the Xilombo, this mod was designed for swords to give REAL damage in entities without even blocking and forced knockback in entities. This mod in the future will add entities and already has one but is not ready
body:
# I'm not working in this mod anymore. Only when I want. Go to [The-King-Sword](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-king-sword)
Hello I’m Xilombo, this mod was designed for swords to give REAL damage in entities without even blocking and forced knockback in entities. This mod in the future will add entities and already has one but is not ready

****SWORDS:****

****Bedrock Sword****: 31 damage and 2 Knockback

****Void Sword****: 63 damage and 3 knockback

****Coming soon...****

****Coming soon...****

****Galaxy Sword****: Infinite absolute damage, 4 of Knockback, forces death on the entity and 1 second after hit falls a lightning on the entity that removes it completely from the world


****ENTITYS:****

****VoidDestroyer****

****Coming soon...****

****Coming soon...****


****Armors:****

****Bedrock Armor: Coming soon...****

****Void Armor: Coming soon...****

****Galaxy Armor: You will be imortal if you equip all pieces of this armor(of version 1.0.1 forward)****


This mod is still in development, later on the swords will have more creative utilities and the mob VoidDestroyer is still in development or it can cause bugs or crashes if you spawn it.


In the future this mod will be able to be played in survival because I will add new items, swords, food, bows, crafts, etc. probably in versions 1.0.5 that I will release it will be playable in survival
